product: Token-based rate limits now available on AI Gateway
tagline: You can now configure token based rate limits on your model serving endpoints.
what_it_does: You can now configure token based rate limits on your model serving endpoints. Try the new Unity AI Gateway Beta A new Unity AI Gateway experience is available in Beta. The new Unity AI Gateway is the enterprise control plane for governing LLM endpoints and coding agents with enhanced features.
